stemHtml: You are at your home base and have had less than 12 hours rest. Your company calls and wants to activate you for airport standby now. Is this possible?

options.a: No, your company can not call you for standby because you must have 12 hours rest at home base.
options.b: Yes, your company can call you for airport standby immediately. However, you can not be activated for a flight until your 12 hours rest are accomplished.
options.c: Yes, your company can call you in to fly immediately regardless of the rest period duration.
options.d: No, your company can not call you for standby because you must have 10 hours rest at home base.
